title: User Registration with Email
description: Verify that a new user can successfully register using a valid email, password, and sport preferences.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration screen.
Enter a valid email address, a strong password, and select sport preferences.
Submit the registration form.
Verify registration success message or auto-login.
Verify a confirmation email is sent to the registered address.

title: User Login with Correct JWT Issuance
description: Ensure that a user can login using valid credentials and receives a valid JWT token.

steps.description: Navigate to the login screen.
Enter valid username/email and password.
Click the login button.
Verify login is successful and JWT token is received.
Verify JWT token contains correct claims and expiry.

title: User Login Failure with Invalid Credentials
description: Ensure login fails when incorrect username/email or password is submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to the login screen.
Enter invalid username/email or password.
Click login button.
Verify login fails and proper error message is shown.

title: Discover Games Using Location-Based Search
description: Verify users can search for games by location with filtering by sport type, skill level, and date.

steps.description: Navigate to the game discovery screen.
Enter or allow current location access.
Apply filters for sport, skill level, date, and game formats.
Verify games list updates to show relevant games within proximity and matching filters.
Verify map view properly shows game locations.

title: Create New Game as Host with Recurrence
description: Test that a host user can create a new game with settings including sport type, capacity, price, and recurring schedule.

steps.description: Login as a host user.
Navigate to create game screen.
Enter all required details: sport type, venue, date/time, capacity, pricing, and recurrence pattern.
Submit the game creation form.
Verify game is created and appears in discovery search.
Verify recurrence creates multiple linked events on the schedule.

title: Join Game and Make Payment Through Stripe
description: Verify a user can RSVP to join a game and complete payment securely via Stripe gateway.

steps.description: Discover and select a game requiring payment.
Click to join and initiate payment process.
Enter valid Stripe payment details and submit.
Verify payment is processed successfully.
Verify RSVP status updates to confirmed.
Verify user receives confirmation notification.

title: Handle Payment Failure and Refunds
description: Verify system correctly handles payment failures during game joining and supports refund processing.

steps.description: Attempt to join a paid game with invalid payment details or declined transaction.
Verify payment failure is detected and rollback occurs.
Verify user is alerted to payment failure with appropriate message.
Trigger a refund request for a paid game cancellation.
Verify refund is processed securely and payment status updates.
Verify user receives refund confirmation notification.

title: Real-time Chat Messaging Between Players
description: Verify that users can send and receive real-time messages and group chats via WebSocket with low latency.

steps.description: Login as user A and open a chat with user B.
Send a text message to user B.
Verify message is delivered instantly to user B.
User B replies back.
Verify user A receives reply message instantly.
Create a group chat and send messages.
Verify all group members receive messages in real-time.

title: Post, Like, and Comment on Social Feed
description: Ensure users can create posts with photos/videos, like posts, and add comments with instant updates.

steps.description: Navigate to social feed screen.
Create a new post including text and photo/video.
Verify the new post appears in feed immediately.
Like a post and verify like count updates.
Add a comment to a post.
Verify comment appears correctly attached to the post.

title: Venue Listing Creation and Booking Workflow
description: Verify venue managers can create venue listings, set pricing, receive bookings, and view analytics dashboards.

steps.description: Login as venue manager.
Navigate to venue management screen.
Create a new venue listing with detailed info and pricing.
Verify venue appears in venue search.
Receive a booking request and approve it.
Verify booking status updates appropriately.
View analytics dashboard data on venue usage and bookings.
Verify analytics display accurate statistics.

title: Notification Delivery for Game Invitations and Reminders
description: Verify that users receive timely push notifications and email summaries for game invites, RSVP reminders, cancellations, and social interactions.

steps.description: Trigger game invitation notification by inviting a user to a game.
Verify the invited user receives push notification on mobile and an email summary.
Trigger RSVP reminder notification before game start time.
Verify reminder notifications are delivered in-app and via email.
Trigger game cancellation notification.
Verify affected users receive cancellation notifications promptly.

title: AI-powered Personalized Game Recommendation Accuracy
description: Verify that AI recommendation engine suggests relevant games based on user profile, preferences, location, and history.

steps.description: Login as a user with sports preferences and playing history.
Navigate to the recommendations section.
Verify displayed game recommendations align with user preferences, skill level, and location.
Change user preferences and trigger recommendation refresh.
Verify recommendations update accordingly.

title: User Profile Management and Statistics Display
description: Ensure that user profiles display correct statistics, achievements, sport preferences, and editable information.

steps.description: Login and navigate to user profile screen.
Verify profile shows accurate game stats, achievements, and preferred sports.
Edit profile details such as bio, sport preferences, and skill level.
Verify changes persist and appear correctly.

title: Location-Based Game Discovery with Geographic Filtering
description: Test geographic search filters including proximity radius and map-based selection to find games or venues.

steps.description: Navigate to location picker or map view.
Set a proximity radius filter and/or select geographic regions on map.
Verify games and venues displayed are within selected geographic constraints.
Change location filters dynamically.
Verify search results update in real-time.

title: Rate Limiting and Security Headers Enforcement
description: Ensure API rate limiting works to prevent abuse and that security headers (CORS, CSP) are properly set.

steps.description: Send rapid repeated API requests exceeding rate limits.
Verify requests are blocked or throttled with appropriate error responses.
Make cross-origin requests to test CORS policy enforcement.
Verify allowed origins are accepted and disallowed origins are blocked.
Inspect HTTP response headers for security headers (e.g., Content-Security-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options).
Verify proper security headers are present on all responses.

title: CRUD Operations for Games with Edge Cases
description: Verify creation, update, retrieval, and deletion of games with edge cases such as max capacity, invalid inputs, and recurrence handling.

steps.description: Create a new game with boundary values for capacity and date.
Verify game is stored correctly with proper validation.
Update game details with invalid sport type or date in the past.
Verify system rejects invalid updates with error messages.
Retrieve game details and verify real-time player counts and RSVP statuses.
Delete an existing game.
Verify game is removed and dependent data updates accordingly.

title: Cross-Platform UI Consistency on Mobile Devices
description: Verify that UI screens, components, and flows behave consistently and responsively on major Android and iOS devices following Nepal-inspired design themes.

steps.description: Launch the app on Android (various screen sizes) and iOS devices.
Verify UI components match design style and color theme.
Navigate through core flows: login, game discovery, social feed, chat, profile.
Verify no layout breakage or element misplacement across devices.
Test UI responsiveness to orientation changes and accessibility settings.
Verify correct adaptive UI behavior.

title: Monitoring and Analytics Data Accuracy
description: Confirm that Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, and health checks report accurate system status and performance data.

steps.description: Simulate normal and peak load conditions on the application.
Verify Prometheus metrics reflect request rates, error rates, and system resource usage.
Access Grafana dashboards to review graphs and alerts.
Verify dashboard metrics update in near real-time and alerts trigger correctly.
Invoke system health check endpoints.
Verify health checks return appropriate status for all microservices.

title: Cricket Scoring System Ball-by-Ball Tracking
description: Validate the cricket integration handles ball-by-ball events, updates live scorecards, player stats, and supports multiple cricket formats.

steps.description: Create a new cricket match with relevant format settings.
Record ball-by-ball events including runs, extras, wickets.
Verify live scorecard updates accurately after each ball.
Verify individual player performance statistics update correctly.
Test end of innings and end of match statistics aggregation.
Verify the final scorecard and analytics are correct.

title: User Logout and Token Revocation
description: Verify that users can securely logout and that their JWT tokens are revoked or invalidated upon logout.

steps.description: Login and obtain JWT token.
Perform logout action from the app.
Verify user session is terminated and token is invalidated.
Attempt to access secured endpoints with the revoked token.
Verify access is denied due to invalid token.
